original_query: select  i_item_desc       ,w_warehouse_name       ,d1.d_week_seq       ,sum(case when p_promo_sk is null then 1 else 0 end) no_promo       ,sum(case when p_promo_sk is not null then 1 else 0 end) promo       ,count(*) total_cnt from catalog_sales join inventory on (cs_item_sk = inv_item_sk) join warehouse on (w_warehouse_sk=inv_warehouse_sk) join item on (i_item_sk = cs_item_sk) join customer_demographics on (cs_bill_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk) join household_demographics on (cs_bill_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk) join date_dim d1 on (cs_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk) join date_dim d2 on (inv_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk) join date_dim d3 on (cs_ship_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk) left outer join promotion on (cs_promo_sk=p_promo_sk) left outer join catalog_returns on (cr_item_sk = cs_item_sk and cr_order_number = cs_order_number) where d1.d_week_seq = d2.d_week_seq   and inv_quantity_on_hand < cs_quantity   and d3.d_date > d1.d_date + interval '3 day'   and hd_buy_potential = '1001-5000'   and d1.d_year = 2001   and cd_marital_status = 'U'   and cd_dep_count between 5 and 7   and i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')   and cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 80 AND 100 group by i_item_desc,w_warehouse_name,d1.d_week_seq order by total_cnt desc, i_item_desc, w_warehouse_name, d_week_seq limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH date_dim_2001 AS (
    SELECT * 
    FROM date_dim 
    WHERE d_year = 2001
)
SELECT 
    i_item_desc,
    w_warehouse_name,
    d1.d_week_seq,
    COUNT(*) - COUNT(p_promo_sk) AS no_promo,
    COUNT(p_promo_sk) AS promo,
    COUNT(*) AS total_cnt
FROM catalog_sales
JOIN item ON (i_item_sk = cs_item_sk)
JOIN customer_demographics ON (cs_bill_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk)
JOIN household_demographics ON (cs_bill_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk)
JOIN date_dim_2001 d1 ON (cs_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk)
JOIN inventory ON (cs_item_sk = inv_item_sk)
JOIN warehouse ON (w_warehouse_sk = inv_warehouse_sk)
JOIN date_dim d2 ON (inv_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk AND d1.d_week_seq = d2.d_week_seq)
JOIN date_dim d3 ON (cs_ship_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk AND d3.d_date > d1.d_date + INTERVAL '3 days')
LEFT JOIN promotion ON (cs_promo_sk = p_promo_sk)
WHERE 
    inv_quantity_on_hand < cs_quantity
    AND hd_buy_potential = '1001-5000'
    AND cd_marital_status = 'U'
    AND cd_dep_count BETWEEN 5 AND 7
    AND i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')
    AND cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 80 AND 100
GROUP BY i_item_desc, w_warehouse_name, d1.d_week_seq
ORDER BY total_cnt DESC, i_item_desc, w_warehouse_name, d1.d_week_seq
LIMIT 100;

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Remove the unnecessary LEFT JOIN to catalog_returns as it's not used in the query results
Replace SUM(CASE WHEN...) expressions with more efficient COUNT functions: COUNT(*) - COUNT(p_promo_sk) for no_promo and COUNT(p_promo_sk) for promo
Move the condition d3.d_date > d1.d_date + INTERVAL '3 days' from the WHERE clause to the JOIN ON clause for earlier filtering
